title: L-System Designer
description: Draw fractal geometry with live rewriting rules, 8 presets, gradient palettes, PNG export and shareable links.
concept: An L-system (Lindenmayer system) designer where mathematical string-rewriting rules iterate into intricate fractals. Choose from eight presets including Koch Snowflake, Dragon Curve, Gosper Curve and a branching plant. Tune iterations, angle and stroke width in real time, then export your creation as a hi-res PNG or share it via URL hash.
features: Live rule editor — edit axiom and production rules
Export as 2× hi-res PNG with watermark
Copy shareable URL (state encoded in hash)

interaction.mouse: drag to pan, scroll to zoom, double-click to reset view
interaction.click: preset pills, palette swatches, sliders, action buttons
interaction.touch: drag to pan, pinch to zoom
